title: Trigger Blocks
description: A mod for creative map making.
body:
This mod adds triggers to a new tab for creative mode.

**How to use them**

<details>
<summary>Trigger</summary>

- place a trigger
- place a receiver 5 blocks away
- when an entity enters the trigger it will power the receiver

</details>


<details>
<summary>Killbox</summary>

- place a killbox
- when an entity enters the killbox they will die

</details>


<details>
<summary>Inspection Plate</summary>

- Place an inspection plate
- when a player clicks the plate it will power a receiver 5 blocks in any direction

</details>


<details>
<summary>Checkpoint</summary>

- Place the checkpoint
- when a player enters the checkpoint it will set the spawn to it

</details>


<details>
<summary>Darkness</summary>

- Place the darkness over light sources
- it will block light like a normal block

</details>
